title: humularia tenuis
intro: Humularia tenuis, also known as the delicate Humularia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Humularia tenuis can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots are also used in traditional medicine, making it a valuable resource for herbal remedies.
